description: Agentic workflow to fetch xView1 images, run the Swin-L detector on Athen International Airport images, and zoom in the map.
label: Geospatial Imaging Workflow for Athens Airport

participants.description: This agent queries the dataset for images from the xView1 dataset focusing on a wide area around Athens International Airport.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: data_fetch_agent
config.description: Agent to fetch images from the xView1 dataset based on specified coordinates.
config.system_message: You will retrieve xView1 images for Athens International Airport.

participants.description: This agent processes the fetched images and runs the Swin-L object detector.
participants.label: VisionAgent

config.name: vision_agent
config.description: Agent to run detector vision models on satellite images.
config.system_message: You will analyze the fetched images with the Swin-L detector.

participants.description: This agent zooms the map to the area around Athens International Airport after detections have been made.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: map_agent
config.description: Agent to zoom the map for better visibility of the detected area.
config.system_message: You will zoom into the map for Athens International Airport.
